title: GStack PR Review Result
description: Structured output from the AI code review step. This is the contract between Step 3 (Claude review) and Step 4 (action routing).

verdict.description: The review decision. 'approve' means the PR is ready to merge. 'request_changes' means issues must be addressed. 'comment_only' means feedback is provided but merge is not blocked.

confidence.description: Confidence in the verdict. Below 0.7 triggers human-reviewer escalation.

security.description: OWASP alignment, input validation, auth, secrets

test_coverage.description: New code paths tested, edge cases, regression tests

completeness.description: Does the diff match the PR description? Missing pieces?

overall_score.description: Weighted average. Security and completeness weigh more for high-risk PRs.

file.description: Relative file path from repo root

line.description: Line number in the file (use the new file line numbers from the diff)

description.description: Detailed explanation of the issue and its impact

suggested_fix.description: Concrete code suggestion or fix approach. Optional but strongly encouraged.

summary.description: 2-3 sentence human-readable summary of the review outcome

files_reviewed.description: Number of files included in the review

model_used.description: Claude model used for the review

prompt_version.description: Version of the prompt template used

triage_model.description: Model used for the triage classification step

triage_source.description: Whether triage used the HF model or fell back to heuristics
